query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS service_payments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  invoice_id INT NOT NULL,
  payment_amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  payment_method ENUM('stripe', 'cash', 'check', 'transfer', 'internal_credit') NOT NULL,
  stripe_payment_intent_id VARCHAR(255),
  stripe_charge_id VARCHAR(255),
  transaction_reference VARCHAR(255),
  trust_deposit_id INT,
  revenue_split_processed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  revenue_split_amount DECIMAL(10,2),
  trust_allocation_amount DECIMAL(10,2),
  payment_date BIGINT NOT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  processed_by_id INT,
  processed_by_name VARCHAR(255),
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (invoice_id) REFERENCES service_invoices(id)
);
